item.name: Tomato King
item.description:
Has issued a royal decree for the public defenestration of any and all who mistakenly claim the king is a vegetable.

Use item to acquire the Tomato King minion.
item.tooltip:
It is apparently a rogue,
outcast from its kin, a
stranger in a strange land.
  - Tomaj
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases action party ATK by 40.
Duration: 15s
